reference: On December 3rd, two thousand and thirteen, I suffered a brain injury from a car accident, specifically to the frontal lobe. I was cleared by the neurosurgeon, yet as the years have passed, I have lost interest in keeping in touch with people. I do not think it is depression because I am not sad about staying away from people.
text: on december 3rd 2013 i suffered a brain injury from a car accident specifically to the frontal lobe i was cleared by the neurosurgeon yet as the years have passed i have lost interest in keeping in touch with people i do not think it is depression because i am not sad about staying away from people
